title: Drug usage in Eva
wikitext:
[]: Drug usage in Eva             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Tue Oct 06, 2009 6:34 pm Ritsuko smokes and ingests plenty of caffeine, Rei pops pills, and Misato's an alcoholic that later overcomes it with determination (but for caffeine in trade). They should've made Kaworu a drug user of some sort, too. His nature's weirder than any of the three above. If he was a druggy, the way he acted would've been much more plausible as a character. Also, Kaji really fit the bill for an abstaining cokehead.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Tue Oct 06, 2009 6:38 pm Asuka acts sometimes like she's going through a withdrawl.

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Tue Oct 06, 2009 6:41 pm Well, she is bipolar. and on her period constantly. What's the deal with women? stop menstruating! Two debilitating things. It's funny the direction they took with Asuka's character. It's an extremely gilded tsudere, half a parody of how other anime girls act. "Here you go, fanboys"

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Tue Oct 06, 2009 6:50 pm

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Tue Oct 06, 2009 6:59 pm Asuka's not bipolar, she's in the starting stages of this: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Narcissistic_personality_disorder

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Tue Oct 06, 2009 7:03 pm FallenTabris wrote: Well, she is bipolar. and on her period constantly. What's the deal with women? stop menstruating! Two debilitating things. It's funny the direction they took with Asuka's character. It's an extremely gilded tsudere, half a parody of how other anime girls act. "Here you go, fanboys"

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Tue Oct 06, 2009 7:03 pm There's (admittedly not very strong) evidence that Asuka drinks as well, actually. And Rei is hardly a pill popper. She seems to need those drugs to stay alive. Plus, Kaworu isn't supposed to be a realistic human being; he's not supposed to have a human psychology at all.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Tue Oct 06, 2009 7:05 pm Kaworu is way too happy, mellow and always smiling. He is also really mellos, so he could be a pothead. His are red, but not the right part. "Weed is the highest point of Lilim culture, wouldn't you agree Mr. Floaty Turtle......"

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Tue Oct 06, 2009 8:57 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Asuka's not bipolar, she's in the starting stages of this: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Narcissistic_personality_disorder

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Oct 06, 2009 10:32 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Asuka's not bipolar, she's in the starting stages of this: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Narcissistic_personality_disorder

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Tue Oct 06, 2009 10:57 pm Shinji is addicted to being depressed. That or he just has some srsly bad Acid trips.

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Tue Oct 06, 2009 11:25 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Sailor Star Dust wrote: Asuka's not bipolar, she's in the starting stages of this: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Narcissistic_personality_disorder

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue Oct 06, 2009 11:42 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Narcissists don't need praise from others, constantly seeking praise is a tell-tale sign of histrionic personality disorder .

[]: Re: Drug usage in Eva             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Oct 07, 2009 1:06 am FallenTabris wrote: They should've made Kaworu a drug user of some sort

[]:             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Wed Oct 07, 2009 2:32 am FallenTabris wrote: Rei pops pills

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Wed Oct 07, 2009 3:14 am Vegeta 20XX wrote: FallenTabris wrote: Rei pops pills

[]:             Quote Post by Teague » Wed Oct 07, 2009 4:54 am Rei II, since your predecessor made Agaki rage-quit life, I want you to start burning weed. I want you mellow as a marshmallow by monday, here. Sure thing...commander...dude...WOAH!

[]:             Quote Post by Legendary » Wed Oct 07, 2009 10:04 am Vegeta 20XX wrote: I never thought I'd get to use this quote... MANGA =/= ANIME (or MANGA != ANIME in Mugen code) Remember that.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Wed Oct 07, 2009 12:18 pm Sammaeloo wrote: Kaworu is way too happy, mellow and always smiling. He is also really mellos, so he could be a pothead. His are red, but not the right part. "Weed is the highest point of Lilim culture, wouldn't you agree Mr. Floaty Turtle......"

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Oct 07, 2009 2:07 pm Teague wrote: Rei II, since your predecessor made Agaki rage-quit life, I want you to start burning weed. I want you mellow as a marshmallow by monday, here. Sure thing...commander...dude...WOAH!

Article: Drug usage in Eva
[]: Drug usage in Eva             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Tue Oct 06, 2009 6:34 pm Ritsuko smokes and ingests plenty of caffeine, Rei pops pills, and Misato's an alcoholic that later overcomes it with determination (but for caffeine in trade). They should've made Kaworu a drug user of some sort, too. His nature's weirder than any of the three above. If he was a druggy, the way he acted would've been much more plausible as a character. Also, Kaji really fit the bill for an abstaining cokehead.
